patch.value:
GitHub: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/448

## Problem (data loss class)
A custom field registered `--type boolean` via `pm schema add-field` is silently never persisted when set through its auto-derived flag (`--customer-impact true` style): create/update succeeds, no warning, field absent from item and changed_fields. Boolean is one of four documented custom-field types; any boolean field (customer_impact, regression, is_blocker...) loses data on every write while reporting success.

## Repro (from GH-448, pm 2026.7.4)
fresh tracker -> `pm schema add-field customer_impact --type boolean --commands create,update` -> `pm create ... --customer-impact true` -> field missing.

## Definition of done
Boolean custom fields persist through create/update (coercion fixed); regression spec across all four field types; silent-drop path converted to hard error for unknown/uncoercible custom values; verified in sandbox from packed tarball.
GH-448: boolean custom field is silently never persisted (data-loss class)

Dogfood GH-448: pm schema add-field --type boolean registers fine but values set via the derived flag are silently dropped on create/update — success reported, data lost. Duplicate check: searched boolean custom field — pm-vhbf/pm-qvdj (closed) shipped the field system; no open item covers the boolean coercion bug.

Boolean custom fields persist via auto-derived flags on create+update; regression spec across all four custom-field types; uncoercible values hard-error instead of silent drop; tarball-sandbox verified

author: codex-root
message: Start broad SDK workspace-customization implementation: promote schema/config/profile/init primitives and fix the linked schema/init correctness regressions in one shared verification lane.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Implementation start: selected after live all-status duplicate checks, full metadata/comments/notes/learnings review, GitHub issue/PR/security/dependency inspection, and SDK-first frontier reconciliation. This item is actively edited in the broad schema/config/profile/init SDK promotion bundle; unrelated open items remain unclaimed.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Live verification correction: current main already persists all four runtime custom-field types. Isolated PM_PATH/PM_GLOBAL_PATH proof created custom_bool:boolean=true, custom_number:number=42, custom_string:string=hello, and custom_array:string_array=[a,b]; pm get returned each typed value. GH-448's customer_impact repro instead collides with a built-in create/update field and belongs to pm-b9ov; no boolean coercion code change is warranted.

patch.value: Already working on current main; four-type isolated regression proof passed and the reported key is a reserved-field collision tracked by pm-b9ov.
Not reproducible on current main (PR#520 verification): four-type isolated regression proof passed; the reported failing key was a reserved-field collision, tracked and fixed by pm-b9ov.
Boolean custom fields persist via auto-derived flags on create and update.
GH-448 report reproduced only via a reserved-field name collision (pm-b9ov class), not a boolean-persistence defect; typed boolean persistence proven in packed-tarball sandbox.
